$schema_note: Proposed analyzer rules not yet promoted to PY-AR-*. Staging area to keep the active rule set curated. Promote when a candidate is validated against real pipelines; on promotion it receives a PY-AR-* id (or keeps its number if no collision).

candidates.name: inplace= usage discouraged
candidates.rationale: In-place mutation hides where numbers change and complicates reconciliation (PY-AP-009).
candidates.promote_when: We can reliably distinguish harmful inplace chains from benign single uses.

candidates.name: Profiling step absent before transforms
candidates.promote_when: We define what evidence counts as 'a profile was run'.

candidates.name: Meaning inferred from column name
candidates.rationale: Assuming semantics from names like amount/date/qty (PY-AP-008).
candidates.promote_when: We can detect unconfirmed semantic assumptions in review context.

candidates.name: drop_duplicates without subset key
candidates.rationale: Dedup with no declared uniqueness key risks deleting legitimate rows (PY-AP-001).
candidates.promote_when: We confirm low false-positive rate flagging legitimate full-row dedup.

candidates.name: fillna(0) on a measure without recorded rule
candidates.rationale: Treating null as zero changes sums/means (PY-AP-013).
candidates.promote_when: We can read whether a recorded imputation rule justifies the fill.

candidates.name: Excel used as a pipeline intermediate
candidates.rationale: Excel mangles types and does not scale (PY-AP and PY-CN-080).
candidates.promote_when: We can distinguish human-interchange I/O from intermediate storage.

candidates.name: Repeated CSV reads not persisted to Parquet
candidates.rationale: Re-parsing/re-inferring CSV on hot paths wastes time and risks drift (PY-CN-079).
candidates.promote_when: We can detect a frame read more than once in a pipeline.
